implementation_backlog.details: Update pb_hooks/main.js: Validate 'superadmin' role in /api/modulos/:id/activate and /api/modulos/:id/deactivate handlers using e.requestInfo().authRecord.
Create new POST endpoint in pb_hooks/main.js. Resolve API keys on server (BYOK from Hacienda or Global from settings). Implement 20 req/day rate limit for global key via _params collection.

implementation_backlog.task: FIX C: Secure Email Proxy (Resend Removal)

implementation_backlog.task: FIX D: Secure AI Frontend Integration
implementation_backlog.details: Update src/services/aiService.js: Redirect calls to /api/ai/chat. Remove client-side key resolution and rate limiting. Maintain local simulation as fallback.
Run 'npm run build' and grep 'dist/' for any leaked 'sk-', 're_', or 'Bearer' tokens. Verify PocketBase restarts with new hooks.
Wrap reports.pb.js and other multi-record writes in $app.dao().runInTransaction().
